structurePatterns: All variants share same padding and radius
Primary uses accent blue (#336EE8) background with white text
Secondary uses panel (#F3F3F3) background with ink-primary text
Ghost has no background, only text color on interaction
Danger uses muted red semantic color
usageHints: One primary button per view — accent blue is a garnish, not a fill
Use medium weight (500) for button labels
doNotInvent: Outline variant — not in Aham system
Large fill areas of accent blue — blue is garnish only
Gradient or shadow on buttons — Aham is flat
